comparison.label: Why HealthStack Pro?
comparison.subtitle: Every fitness app eventually asks for your card. HealthStack Pro doesn't. Core features free forever — no tricks.

seo_articles.label: Guides & resources
seo_articles.subtitle: Science-based fitness. No myths, no unnecessary supplements.

articles.title: How to create a caloric deficit?
articles.body: Subtract 300-500 kcal from your TDEE. That creates a loss of 0.3-0.5 kg/week without losing muscle. More aggressive = more muscle lost. HealthStack Pro calculates it automatically.

articles.title: How much muscle can I gain per month?
articles.body: Beginners: 1-2 kg/month. Intermediate: 0.5-1 kg/month. Advanced: 0.25 kg/month. Protein (2g/kg/day) and a 200-300 kcal surplus are the two key factors.

articles.title: Beginner gym workout routine
articles.body: 3 days/week Full Body (push, pull, legs). Linear progression: increase 2.5 kg when you complete all sets. HealthStack Pro's generator creates your exact plan.

articles.title: Best free fitness app in Spanish
articles.body: HealthStack Pro: TDEE + macros + routines + weight + community. No card, no paywall on core features. The only Spanish app with free integrated AI.

articles.title: Only 3 supplements with solid evidence
articles.body: Creatine monohydrate (3-5g/day), whey protein (if you can't hit protein goals from food) and caffeine (3-6mg/kg pre-workout). The rest is marketing.

articles.title: Why eat more protein when losing fat?
articles.body: In a caloric deficit, the body may catabolize muscle. 2-2.4g protein/kg/day protects lean mass during a cut. It also increases satiety and has a higher thermic effect.

tdee.label: Free tool
tdee.subtitle: Calculate your total caloric expenditure and personalized macronutrients in seconds. 100% free, no signup.
tdee.cta: Track my macros in the app — Free
tdee.seo1_body: TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) is the total calories you burn per day. It includes your basal metabolic rate plus energy spent on physical activity. Knowing it is the first step toward any fitness goal.
tdee.seo2_body: Macros are proteins, carbohydrates and fats. Distribute your caloric goal according to your objective: to gain muscle, prioritize protein (2g/kg); to lose fat, create a 300-500 kcal deficit below your TDEE.
tdee.seo3_body: We use the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, the most accurate according to current scientific evidence. Your BMR is multiplied by an activity factor (revised Harris-Benedict) to get your real TDEE.

integrations.label: Your ecosystem
integrations.subtitle: HealthStack Pro connects with the apps you already use. Import data, export progress, all in one place.
